item.title: 👍LeeAnn Prielipp - WEA-Retired
item.description: LeeAnn Prielipp signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WEA-Retired.

item.description: Jared Mason-Gere signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Education Association.

item.description: James Shepherd signed up to testify Pro.

item.description: Candice Bock signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Cities. They are a registered lobbyist.
